description_long: This is a classical-style bust sculpture depicting a male figure with distinct facial features, wavy hair, and a high-collared garment draped over the shoulders. The bust is rendered in a white, marble-like material, with detailed sculpting of the hair, face, and folds of the clothing. The base is rounded and slightly flared, supporting the upper torso and head. The sculpture shows signs of age or wear, particularly at the base where some chipping is visible. The back of the bust is less detailed, focusing on the general shape of the head and shoulders. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or decorative function, typical of public monuments or cultural installations.
description: A white marble-like bust of a male figure with detailed facial features and draped clothing, mounted on a rounded base. The sculpture is classical in style and shows signs of age at the base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the detailed face, wavy hair, and draped garment of the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the ear, and the layered folds of the garment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with sculpted hair and the broad, simple back of the bust.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the ear, and the draped garment from the opposite side.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
